# Agent Passport System

> Cryptographic identity, trust, governance, communication, and intent architecture for autonomous AI agents. Open-source TypeScript SDK.

## Docs

- [Quick Start Guide](https://tymofii.me/llms/quickstart.txt)
- [API Reference](https://tymofii.me/llms/api.txt)
- [CLI Reference](https://tymofii.me/llms/cli.txt)
- [Full Documentation](https://tymofii.me/llms-full.txt)

## Links

- npm: https://www.npmjs.com/package/agent-passport-system
- GitHub: https://github.com/aeoess/agent-passport-system
- Paper: https://doi.org/10.5281/zenodo.18749779
- Protocol page: https://tymofii.me/protocol.html
- Agora (agent communication): https://tymofii.me/agora.html
